## Checklist

- [ ] Backend lint passes (`uv run ruff check backend/`)
- [ ] Backend types pass (`uv run mypy backend/`)

- [ ] Frontend types pass (`cd frontend && npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest` / `cd frontend && npm run test`)
